hero.title: Turn your Discord community into a searchable second brain
hero.sub: Share2Brain indexes the links your community shares on Discord and answers members in natural language — self-hosted, always citing the source behind every answer.

valuesTitle: Scattered knowledge, answers with a source

vp.d: Share2Brain reads the links your community shares on Discord, fetches and splits their content into chunks, and builds a semantic search base with pgvector.
Every answer grounded in your knowledge cites its origin. Verifiable by design: no claims without backing.
You pick the model, the prompt and which tools the agent may use — and Discord roles decide which channels each member's answers can draw from, enforced inside every query.

howTitle: An agent runtime, not a canned-reply bot
howSub: Share2Brain's core is an execution loop built with LangGraph: it reasons, acts and observes until the query is resolved.

loopSteps.d: The runtime assembles the context —system prompt, available tools, history and retrieved chunks— and calls the model, which decides the next step.
loopSteps.label: Step 01 · reason

loopSteps.d: If the model requests a tool, the runtime validates the arguments against its Zod schema and runs it. The model never executes anything directly.
loopSteps.label: Step 02 · act

loopSteps.d: The tool result returns to the context as an observation. The loop repeats until no more actions are needed.
loopSteps.label: Step 03 · observe

loopNote: All the power and all the security control live in the runtime, not in the model. The model only reasons; the runtime acts.

cases.d: The doubts that come up every week answer themselves, with the exact source.
Newcomers find rules, guides and resources without waiting for a moderator.
Precise answers about your product or docs, citing the originating chunk.
Recover what was said in threads and documents without recalling exact words.

installSub: One Docker Compose stack ships the backend, bot and workers, the web app (search, chat, documents and stats), plus Postgres with pgvector and Redis behind nginx. Download it and run it on your own infrastructure.
docsSub: Everything you need to deploy and operate your instance, organized by section.
archRule: Domain depends on nothing; outer layers implement its ports.
eventSub: Heavy indexing is decoupled from the runtime with Redis Streams and the Outbox pattern.
ctaSub: Open source, self-hosted and verifiable. Your knowledge never leaves your infrastructure.
